_comment: Declarative arch → builder runner mapping. Consumed by 1_workflows/src/scripts/cloud-ship-container-step-build-docker.sh and cloud-ship-ci-builder-dispatch.sh. amd64 = local GHA/host. arm64 = remote ssh runner on oci-apps. The arm64 builder_image MUST match the actually-published GHCR package (see a_solutions/bd-cloud-builder-x/src/compose.nix → cloud-builder-x-deb-nixhm).
